mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pattern_request SET auto_pattern = #{auto_pattern}, bcf_cycle_no = #{bcf_cycle_no}, tf_cycle_no = #{tf_cycle_no}, bcf_hogi = #{bcf_hogi}, tf_hogi = #{tf_hogi}, status = 1, -- 온도/시간은 PLC가 채워줄 예정이므로 일단 NULL 초기화 bcf_time_fanup = NULL, bcf_time_spare1 = NULL, bcf_time_spare2 = NULL, bcf_time_chim = NULL, bcf_time_diff = NULL, bcf_time_gang = NULL, bcf_time_spare3 = NULL, bcf_time_que = NULL, bcf_time_drain = NULL, bcf_temp_fanup = NULL, bcf_temp_spare1 = NULL, bcf_temp_spare2 = NULL, bcf_temp_chim = NULL, bcf_temp_diff = NULL, bcf_temp_gang = NULL, bcf_temp_spare3 = NULL, bcf_temp_que = NULL, bcf_temp_drain = NULL, bcf_cp_fanup = NULL, bcf_cp_spare1 = NULL, bcf_cp_spare2 = NULL, bcf_cp_chim = NULL, bcf_cp_diff = NULL, bcf_cp_gang = NULL, tf_time_spare1 = NULL, tf_time_spare2 = NULL, tf_time_spare3 = NULL, tf_time_spare4 = NULL, tf_time_dry = NULL, tf_time_fanup = NULL, tf_time_n2 = NULL, tf_time_tem = NULL, tf_time_cool = NULL, tf_temp_spare1 = NULL, tf_temp_spare2 = NULL, tf_temp_spare3 = NULL, tf_temp_spare4 = NULL, tf_temp_dry = NULL, tf_temp_fanup = NULL, tf_temp_n2 = NULL, tf_temp_tem = NULL, tf_temp_cool = NULL WHERE req_code = (SELECT req_code FROM (SELECT req_code FROM tb_pattern_request LIMIT 1) t)
UPDATE tb_pattern_request SET status = 3 WHERE req_code = (SELECT req_code FROM (SELECT req_code FROM tb_pattern_request LIMIT 1) t)

UPDATE tb_pattern_request SET status = 0, auto_pattern = 0, bcf_cycle_no = 0, tf_cycle_no = 0, bcf_hogi = 0, tf_hogi = 0, bcf_time_fanup = 0, bcf_time_spare1 = 0, bcf_time_spare2 = 0, bcf_time_chim = 0, bcf_time_diff = 0, bcf_time_gang = 0, bcf_time_spare3 = 0, bcf_time_que = 0, bcf_time_drain = 0, bcf_temp_fanup = 0, bcf_temp_spare1 = 0, bcf_temp_spare2 = 0, bcf_temp_chim = 0, bcf_temp_diff = 0, bcf_temp_gang = 0, bcf_temp_spare3 = 0, bcf_temp_que = 0, bcf_temp_drain = 0, bcf_cp_fanup = 0, bcf_cp_spare1 = 0, bcf_cp_spare2 = 0, bcf_cp_chim = 0, bcf_cp_diff = 0, bcf_cp_gang = 0, tf_time_spare1 = 0, tf_time_spare2 = 0, tf_time_spare3 = 0, tf_time_spare4 = 0, tf_time_dry = 0, tf_time_fanup = 0, tf_time_n2 = 0, tf_time_tem = 0, tf_time_cool = 0, tf_temp_spare1 = 0, tf_temp_spare2 = 0, tf_temp_spare3 = 0, tf_temp_spare4 = 0, tf_temp_dry = 0, tf_temp_fanup = 0, tf_temp_n2 = 0, tf_temp_tem = 0, tf_temp_cool = 0 WHERE req_code = (SELECT req_code FROM (SELECT req_code FROM tb_pattern_request LIMIT 1) t)
